verses.text: “Thumanlo na genkhia kei ding uh hi. Elna tawh teci pang dingin migilopa tawh na kipawl kei ding uh hi
Siatna a bawl dingin mihon na zui kei ding uh hi. Thutang a hei khia dingin mihonpi nung zui-in thu neihna-ah teci na pang kei ding uh hi
Ama thu neihna-ah mizawngpa na langneih kei ding uh hi
“Na langneih mite' bawngtal ahi a, a la ahi zongin a gammang na tuah uh leh ama kiangah na hawlkik ding uh hi
Nangmah a hong mudahpa' la a van tawh a puk na muh leh a la tawh amah na nusia kei ding a, tua la phot toh ding na huh ding hi
“Ama thu neihna-ah mizawngpa a thutang kimlai na lelsak kei ding uh hi
A manlopi-a mi mawhsak ding panin kikem un la, a dikpa leh thumanpa that kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gilo mi ka khah kei ding hi
Sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumgolh in uliante' mit tawsak a, thuman mite' thu heikhiatsak hi
“Khualmi na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Khualmi' lungsim na thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi.
“Note in na leitang uhah kum guk sung khai tuhin a piangte na kaikhawm ding uh hi

Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ciangin, nomau' mi a zawngte in a nek theihna dingin leitang tawlnga sakin, lokhulin na omsak ding uh a, gamlak ganhingte in mizawngte' nekloh teng ne thei ding uh hi. Na leenggui lote uh leh na oliv lote uh zong tua bangmahin na hih ding uh hi

“Ni guk sung na nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na bawngtal leh na la in tawlngakna a neih theihna ding leh, na nasem numei' tapa leh khual mite in thathak a ngah theihna dingin a ni sagih ni-in na tawlnga ding uh hi
Note' tunga kong gente khempeuh thudon un; pasian dangte' min genin nei kei un la, na kam sung panun zong tua bangte kizasak kei un.
“Kum khatin thumvei, keima-a' dingin pawi na bawl ding uh hi

Silngo sawhloh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Keimah in note kong thupiak bangin Abib kha sung a kisehsa hun ciangin ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi. Khut hawmguak tawh keima mai-ah kuamah hong kilaklo ding hi
“Note in lo-a na tuh uh, na nasepna uh a gah masa, anlak pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Note in lo panin na nasepna uh a gah na kaihkhop uh kum bei ciangin an kaihkhopna pawi na bawl ding uh hi
Topa Pasian' mai-ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thumvei kilaak ding uh hi
“Note in silngo sawh anlum tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a, a ganhing thau zong zingsang dong na omsak kei ding uh hi
“Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh inn-ah na paipih ding uh hi. * “Note in a pi' nawizu tawh keelno na huan kei ding uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Israel mite a Makaih dingin Topa' Vantung mi Kisawl

verses.text: “En un, keimah in ka bawlsa munah note hong paipih ding leh lamkalah note hong cing dingin note' mai-ah vantung mi khat ka sawl hi
Amah thudonin ama aw ngai un la, amah lehdo kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in note' thu palsatna hong maisaklo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima min tawh nasem ahi hi
“Ahih hangin note in ama aw limtakin ngai-in keima gen bangin na gamtat uh leh na galte uh' tungah gal ka hi ding a, na langte uh' tungah lang ka hi ding hi
“Note' mai-ah ka vantung mi pai-in Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite kiangah note hong paipihin, keimah in amaute ka phiat khiat ciangin
amau' pasian-te' mai-ah note kun loin, tuate bia loin, amau' gamtat bangin na gamta kei ding uh a, note in amaute lawnthal mang kiuhkeuhin amau' milim suang khuampite na satnen gawp ding uh hi
Note in Topa na Pasian uh nong bia ding uh a, keimah in na an uh leh na tui uh thupha ka pia ding hi. Keimah in note' lak panin cinatna ka la khia ding hi
Note' leitangah kuamah nausia omlo ding a, a ciing zong omlo ding hi. Note kong teeksihsak ding hi
“Keimah hong kikihtakna note' mai-ah paisakin note' phutkhak ding mi khempeuh ka kitokgawpsak ding a, na galte khempeuh uh lehhei-in note' kiang panin ka taisak ding hi
Note' mai panin Hiv mite, Kanaan mite, leh Hit mite a hawlkhia dingin note' mai-ah tunpi ka sawlkhia ding hi
Leitung gamkhing suakin gamlak ganhingte note' langkhatah tampi pha khading ahih manin note' mai panin kum khat sungin amaute ka hawlkhia kei ding hi
Note khangin tampi pha-in leitang na luah matengun note' mai panin tawm tawmin amaute ka hawlkhia ding hi

Keimah in San Tuipi panin Filistia mite' tuipi ciang leh sehnel gam panin Eufratis gun ciangdongah na gamgite uh ka phut ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua gama teng mite note' khutsungah kong pia ding a, note in na mai uh panin amaute na hawlkhia ding uh hi
Amaute ahi a, amau' pasian-te tawh ahi zongin thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh hi

Amaute in kei' tungah note hong khialsak khading ahih ciangin note' leitang tungah amaute tenglo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in amau' pasian-te na biak uh leh note' tungah thangzak khat hong hi taktak ding hi,” a ci hi.
